bird.name: Blue-mantled crested flycatcher
bird.summary: The blue-mantled crested flycatcher or African crested flycatcher (Trochocercus cyanomelas) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae…

locations.name: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约
locations.summary: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约（法語：Louis Pierre Vieillot，1748年5月10日—1830年8月24日）是法国的鳥類學家。 维埃约是第一批用卡尔·林奈式二名法科学描述鸟类的研究者之一。至少有26个他命名的鸟类至今仍在学术界使用…

relations.subject: Blue-mantled crested flycatcher
relations.evidence: | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Trochocercus | species = cyanomelas | authority = (Vieillot, 1818) | subdivision_ranks = Subspecies | subdivision = See text | synonyms = }} The blue-mantled crested flycatcher or African crested flycatcher (Trochocercus cyanomelas) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae found in eastern and south-eastern Africa
